seoTitle: Cradock vs Crafers — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cradock and Crafers. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cradock and Crafers.
heading: Cradock vs Crafers — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cradock, South Australia and Crafers, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crafers has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cradock (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cradock or Crafers safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cradock has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Crafers scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cradock scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Crafers scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cradock or Crafers?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crafers has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
